#+TITLE: Heading Edge Cases

* Level 1
** Level 2
*** Level 3
**** Level 4
***** Level 5

* Another Level 1

*** Gap: skipping level 2

* Back to level 1
***** Big gap: 1 to 5

* Heading with trailing spaces
** Also trailing spaces

*Not a heading (no space after stars)
**** Heading right after non-heading text

* TODO A todo heading
* DONE A done heading
* TODO [#A] High priority
* TODO [#B] Medium priority
* TODO [#C] Low priority
* [#A] Priority without TODO (valid in org-mode)

* Heading :tag1:
** Heading :tag1:tag2:
*** Heading with many tags :tag1:tag2:tag3:tag4:
* Short :t:
*  Extra space after star :tag:

* Heading with no content after it
* Next heading immediately

* Heading
Some body text
** Sub-heading directly after text (no blank line)

*
** Empty headings (just stars)

* WAITING Custom TODO keyword
* CANCELLED Another custom keyword

* Heading with TODO in body
This line has TODO in it but is not a heading.

* Heading with *bold* text (stars in body, not heading)
Some text with ** double stars ** in the middle.
